{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Aetheric telekinesis
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Natural resistance weakens [[Aetheric telekinesis]] as a person tries to reassert control over their local [[Aether]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51">''The Engineer'', chapter 51</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
